scripts.test:correctness: vitest run test/pit.test.ts test/pit-db.test.ts test/event-backtest.test.ts test/event-backtest-db.test.ts test/portfolio-backtest.test.ts
scripts.test:no-lookahead: vitest run test/pit.test.ts test/pit-db.test.ts test/pit-snapshot-db.test.ts test/event-backtest-db.test.ts
scripts.export:snapshots: wrangler d1 execute macro_liquidity --remote --json --command "SELECT date, factors_json, spx, qe_qt_regime, vix_eod FROM model_snapshot_weekly WHERE decision_status = 'OK' AND spx IS NOT NULL ORDER BY date" > scripts/data/snapshots.json
